title: Assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§803. Assistant district attorneys

           The offices of first and second assistant district attorneys for the Thirty-Second Judicial District are created.

           Added by Acts 1968, No. 306, §1.
doc_text:
§803.  Assistant district attorneys
The offices of first and second assistant district attorneys for the
Thirty-Second Judicial District are created.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 306, §1.
